usecase.name: [Sample App] Toggle Pricing Plans
usecase.description: Toggle between monthly and annual pricing and verify prices update

steps.instruction: Navigate to the Pricing page using the navigation bar
Verify the Monthly/Annual toggle is visible
Verify the Starter tier shows '$29' (monthly price)
Verify the Professional tier shows '$79' (monthly price)
Click the pricing toggle to switch to Annual
Verify the Starter tier now shows '$290' (annual price)
Verify the Professional tier now shows '$790' (annual price)
Click 'Get Started' button on the Professional tier
Verify a modal appears with text 'This is a demo application'
Click the 'Got it' button to close the modal
